# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_appgateway (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the application gateway.
- `resource_group` (String) The name of the resource group.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authentication_certificates` (String) Authentication certificates of the application gateway resource.
- `autoscale_configuration` (String) Autoscale configuration of the application gateway resource.
- `backend_address_pools` (String) List of backend address pool of the application gateway resource.
- `backend_http_settings_collection` (String) Backend http settings of the application gateway resource.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enable_http2` (Boolean) Whether HTTP2 is enabled on the application gateway resource.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `frontend_ip_configurations` (String) Frontend IP addresses of the application gateway resource.
- `frontend_ports` (String) List of frontend ports of the application gateway resource.
- `gateway_ip_configurations` (String) List of subnets used by the application gateway.
- `gateway_state` (String) Start or Stop the application gateway. When specified, no updates will occur to the gateway.
- `http_listeners` (String) List of HTTP listeners of the application gateway resource.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Resource location. If not set, location from the resource group will be used as default.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `probes` (String) Probes available to the application gateway resource.
- `redirect_configurations` (String) Redirect configurations of the application gateway resource.
- `request_routing_rules` (String) List of request routing rules of the application gateway resource.
- `rewrite_rule_sets` (String) List of rewrite configurations for the application gateway resource.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sku` (String) SKU of the application gateway resource.
- `ssl_certificates` (String) SSL certificates of the application gateway resource.
- `ssl_policy` (String) SSL policy of the application gateway resource.
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the application gateway. Use `present` to create or update and `absent` to delete.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `trusted_root_certificates` (String) Trusted Root certificates of the application gateway resource.
- `url_path_maps` (String) List of URL path maps of the application gateway resource.
- `web_application_firewall_configuration` (String) Web application firewall configuration of the application gateway resource. Note that as of version 2.8.0, *firewall_policy* is required instead of deprecated options. See https://github.com/ansible-collections/azure/pull/1697.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `operational_state` (String) Operating state of application gateway.
- `provisioning_state` (String) Provisioning state of application gateway.
